import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import Category from '../components/Category'; import Footer from '../components/Footer'; import heroIllustration from '../Assets/freelancer.svg'; const features = [ { icon: '🎯', title: 'Smart Job Matching', desc: 'Our algorithm surfaces roles that fit your skills, experience, and salary expectations — no endless scrolling.', }, { icon: '⚡', title: 'Apply in One Click', desc: 'Your profile is your CV. Apply to any job instantly without re-entering your details every time.', }, { icon: '🏢', title: 'Verified Employers', desc: 'Every company on our platform is vetted. No ghost jobs, no spam — only real opportunities.', }, { icon: '🔔', title: 'Real-Time Alerts', desc: 'Get notified the moment a role matching your profile goes live, before the competition.', }, { icon: '📊', title: 'Salary Insights', desc: 'See transparent salary ranges on every listing so you always know what to expect.', }, { icon: '🤝', title: 'Direct Recruiter Access', desc: 'Message hiring managers directly — no middlemen, no black-hole applications.', }, ]; function Home() { return (
